label: Fixes
items: Soil sensors no longer sit forever on "Offline / No readings yet". The Connect wizard now triggers an immediate sync as soon as you save your devices, so the first readings show up within a second of finishing the wizard.
Refresh button on the Integrations page now actually pulls fresh readings from your Ecowitt gateway (not just a stale device-list reload). Tap it any time you want to force a sync.
Soil sensor card now says "Awaiting first reading — tap Refresh to sync now" when there are no readings yet, instead of the cryptic "No readings yet".
